dialogos.texto_en: (Who's that over there...Nino and Raiha?\n Oh, wait? Are they waving at me?)
Biiig brooo!
Fu-kun, over here!
What's up? What's going on?
WOAH?!\nHey, why are you grabbing me so tightly?!
To make sure you don't get away, of course.
Huh?
Since the trip over here, Ichika has managed to dodge me,\nbut I'll make sure to hear it from you.
Huh?
About this morning.
Ahh... That...
(Well, I don't have anything to hide,\n so if I just tell the truth,\n she'll understand, right?)
That's why I keep telling you guys,\nyou're overthinking it.
So, what were you doing?
We went running.\nIchika invited me to run\nalong Kokusai dori this morning.
Huh?
It's true, please believe me.
If you're going to try and cover it up at this point,\nI won't go easy on you, even if it's you, Fu-kun.
Um, was there really nothing going on?\nI was just joking a little before...\nI'm sorry.
See, even Raiha is saying so, right?
But why bother going for a run so early\non a trip like this?
We really did!\nIt's because it's part of Ichika's daily routine.\nShe asked me to come along.
That's also truuue.
*sigh*\nYou really ran around in the early morning like that.\nYou're really something.
I think so too. By the way, if you're satisfied,\ncan you let go of me?\nThis is starting to look suspicious.
Okay, okay.
Listen, Fu-kun.\nIf you do anything weird to Ichika,\nI won't forgive you, you know?
I already said I won't...
How can you be so sure?\nYou'll be roommates with Ichika\nfor the entiiire trip, you know?
As her sister, it's only natural for me to warn you,\nFu-kun.
Well, then...
How about changing rooms?
Hmph, not confident you can endure it?
That's not it!
But if we weren't roommates,\nwe wouldn't have to worry about this, right?
Well, we would feel more secure that way too,\nbut there's nothing we can do about it.
What do you mean there's nothing we can do?\nWhy did you even arrange the rooms this way?
I wooondeeer?
(Kkh...\n She's clearly playing dumb!)
Hey, can we drop this conversation already?
That's right, I'll let you off the hook for now.
By the way, where were you guys headed?
Like I'd do anything weird!!
OH, really?\nYour face is all red though, so even if you say that,\nyou can't persuade me at all, can you?
...Is my face really that red?
Yes, beet red.\nLike a boiled octopus.
I feel like things are gonna get weird.
I said, I won't let that happen!
Fine, fine, it's just a joke.\nI get it. I guess it's fine if you say it is, Fu-kun.
Besides%p-2;――
The fact that you're being this mindful, \nmeans that you're really thinking about Ichika.
And, what's up with that?
Oh, nothiiing.\nJust thought you were passionate.
Passionate...
You're good friends!
H-hey, could we drop this conversation already?
That's right, I'll let you off the hook for now.
By the way, where were you guys headed?
Well, if I say I don't feel weird at all,\nit would be a lie...
Hmmm?
I absolutely won't initiate anything. I promise.
Alright, it's a promise then.
Well, you just have to believe me on that.
I mean, you are a boy after all, Fu-kun.\nIt's natural to have one or two weird thoughts.
L-like it's my fault!
You may not be at fault, but for you to say that with \nso much honesty to Raiha-chan and I,\nI can't help but laugh a little.
(Y-yeah...!\n What am I saying in front of my little sister?)
It's okay, big bro.\nI'm actually relieved that you're properly in love.
Yeah...
In consideration of your honesty,\nI guess I'll believe you.
Thank you...
Hey, can we drop this conversation already?
That's right, I'll let you off the hook for now.
By the way, where were you guys headed?
We're going to the Tropical Dream Center.\nApparently, you can see orchids all year round there.
Oh, the botanical garden in the greenhouse?
They also have various other rare plants as well.\nI'm looking forward to it.
Yeah, it's something you can only enjoy here.
